adhvanīna, adhvanya a. [adhvānaṃ alaṃ gacchati; adhvan-kha-yat vā; adhvano yatkhau  P. V. 2. 16 ] Able to undertake a journey, speeding on a journey; kṣipraṃ tato 'dhvanyaturaṃgayāyī  Bk. 2. 44. 
— naḥ, -nyaḥ A traveller going fast, wayfarer.
